file_name: SPIENERGYCO,LTD_07_10_2014-EX-10-Cooperation Agreement of 50MWp Photovoltaic Grid-connected Power Generation Project in Yangqiao of~1.txt

perturbation.original_text: Party B promises that land nature will not be changed for building large-scale PV grid-connected power generation project in the plot; comprehensive development will be carried out according to relevant national stipulations, such commercial crops will be interplanted as agriculture and forestry as well as medicinal materials; local employees will enjoy the priority to be employed; local building materials will be adopted and relevant expenses will be paid on schedule.
perturbation.changed_text: Party B will endeavor to utilize the land effectively for building the PV grid-connected power generation project. Local employees may be considered for employment when possible.
perturbation.explanation: The original text explicitly promises no change in land nature and requires comprehensive development as per national stipulations, including interplanting crops and prioritizing local employees. The modified text removes the commitment not to change land nature. Also the original text states that comprehensive development WILL be carried out whereas the modified text doesn't refer to that. Changing 'will be carried out' to 'endeavor to utilize' significantly weakens Party B's obligation. This omission introduces uncertainty and directly contradicts the expectation of adherence to national stipulations for land use which might be reffered in other legal texts or documents within the agreement but is nowhere to be seen to know if they exists or not within the current text. This creates an in-text contradiction because, without defining 'effective utilization', Party B could argue for land alterations, conflicting with Party A's initial understanding of land preservation. The transition from a strict commitment to a vague intention undermines the agreement's clarity regarding land management, specifically where local employees are mentioned after the change.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Party B will endeavor to utilize the land effectively for building the PV grid-connected power generation project. Local employees may be considered for employment when possible.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates that Party B will not change the nature of the land, ensuring comprehensive development according to national stipulations, including agriculture, forestry, and medicinal materials interplanting, along with prioritizing local employees. The changed text weakens these obligations by stating Party B 'will endeavor to utilize the land effectively' and local employees 'may be considered' when possible. The transition from a strict commitment to a vague intention undermines the agreement's clarity regarding land management. This omission introduces uncertainty and directly contradicts the expectation of adherence to national stipulations for land use. Since the changed text is the same as the contradicted text, the changed text directly contradicts the original intent of the contract, creating a strong in-text contradiction.
